title: Coverage, Thresholds, and Meaningful Evidence · Policy Recall
summary: Set coverage policy that exposes risk without encouraging empty tests. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a changed-code coverage and exception policy after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Interpret line, branch, function, condition, and path coverage limitations.
Choose global, package, and changed-code thresholds from risk and baseline.
Exclude generated or unreachable code with reviewed narrow rules.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# Risk-profiled repository gate portfolio
# Each gate needs purpose, command, failure fixture, owner, and suppression policy.

steps.title: Coverage Kinds · changed case
steps.instruction:
Use a changed review case derived from this module: gates coverage. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

Use a changed review case derived from this module: gates coverage. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result. Which action demonstrates Coverage Kinds without dropping earlier contracts?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for interpret line, branch, function, condition, and path coverage limitations.

content.text: Interpret line, branch, function, condition, and path coverage limitations. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Check preconditions, perform the operation in an inspectable order, then verify the result and a boundary case.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: Use a changed worked example case derived from this module: gates coverage. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result. A defensible solution applies Coverage Kinds, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to a changed-code coverage and exception policy.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: One coverage percentage describes all tested behavior. This fails the Coverage Kinds contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.label: Research anchor
content.value: Clang AddressSanitizer and UndefinedBehaviorSanitizer (Clang 23 development documentation) — Controls native-code runtime sanitizer purpose, build profiles, output, limitations, and security cautions.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Interpret line, branch, function, condition, and path coverage limitations.

Interpret line, branch, function, condition, and path coverage limitations. Apply it to the stated input and retain a reproducible trace for a changed-code coverage and exception policy.

steps.title: Separate evidence from confidence
steps.instruction:
Use a changed review case derived from this module: gates coverage. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

Inspect the Coverage Review trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for pair coverage gaps with mutation, defect, and risk evidence.

content.text: For Coverage Review, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

stimulus.title: Coverage Review case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Use a changed review case derived from this module: gates coverage. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: The highest-coverage test suite is automatically best.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Pair coverage gaps with mutation, defect, and risk evidence. Artifact under review: a changed-code coverage and exception policy.

options.text: The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.
The record names the assumption, applies Coverage Review, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

steps.title: Record what required effort
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Coverage Review applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Pair coverage gaps with mutation, defect, and risk evidence.
